rationale: Counterfactual for the CVE-2015-8540 finding: same function, same 4-byte symbolic key buffer, but now an LLM-supplied bound that asserts the last byte is 0. This models the caller-contract fix that landed in libpng 1.6.20. KLEE should return infeasible, confirming that if the library had enforced (or the caller had guaranteed) null-termination, the OOB would not be reachable.
